All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

R

reset() - Method in class com.scanlinearcade.games.snake.SnakeModel
Resets the game to its initial state clears the snake body, places the snake at the center, resets score and gameOver, sets direction to RIGHT, and spawns a new food item.
reset(int) - Method in class com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout.BreakoutScore
Resets score and lives for a new game.
reset(int, int) - Method in class com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout.Ball
Resets the ball to the provided position and default launch speed.
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.scanlinearcade.games.snake.Direction
